message:
feat: Add CROSS JOIN, FULL OUTER JOIN, bitwise operators, and expression arithmetic

- Add CROSS JOIN support (Cartesian product without ON clause)
- Add FULL OUTER JOIN with proper unmatched row handling
- Add bitwise operators in constant expressions: & | ^ << >> ~
- Add BIT_COUNT function for population count
- Add proper operator precedence for constant arithmetic
- Fix STRING_AGG aggregate function parsing
- Improve expression parsing for arithmetic and bitwise operations
